name: Molded Mandarin Cranberry Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, mix together the gelatin, sugar, and salt. Drain the mandarin oranges; stir the syrup into the gelatin mixture. Place over low heat; stir constantly until the gelatin and sugar are dissolved. Remove from heat.
2. Add lemon juice, whole cranberry sauce, diced celery, and chopped nuts to the bowl.
3. Arrange oranges in a mold (a ring mold, small Tupperware mold, or pretty crystal bowl can be used). Spoon the cranberry sauce over the oranges. Refrigerate until serving.
I have used this recipe since 1962, when it was given to me by a fellow employee at the Oklahoma Medical Research Foundation. My mother (80 years old in 1992) requests this every Thanksgiving. The combined flavors are very tasty.
